create.description: Create a mail folder in the root folder of the user's mailbox

get.description: Retrieve information about an attachment of a message

getAll.description: Retrieve information about the attachments of a message

move.description: Move a message to a folder

reply.description: Create a reply to a message

sendAndWait.description: Send a message and wait for response

add.description: Add an attachment to a message

download.description: Download an attachment from a message

name.description: The name of the calendar to create

calendarGroup.description: If set, the calendar will be created in the specified calendar group. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

color.description: Specify the color to distinguish the calendar from the others

assistantName.description: The name of the contact's assistant

businessPhones.description: Comma-separated list of business phone numbers

categories.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

children.description: Comma-separated list of names of the contact's children

fileAs.description: The name the contact is filed under

manager.description: The name of the contact's manager

bccRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of BCC recipients

ccRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of CC recipients

value.description: Value to set for the header
Value to set for the header

from.description: The owner of the mailbox from which the message is sent. Must correspond to the actual mailbox used.

isReadReceiptRequested.description: Whether a read receipt is requested for the message

replyTo.description: Email address to use when replying

toRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of recipients

hideAttendees.description: Whether to allow each attendee to only see themselves in the meeting request and meeting tracking list

saveToSentItems.description: Whether to save the message in Sent Items

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

emailAddress.description: If contacts that you want to retrieve have multiple email addresses, you can enter them separated by commas

color.description: Specify the color to distinguish the calendar from the others

bccRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of BCC recipients

categories.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

ccRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of CC recipients

value.description: Value to set for the header
Value to set for the header

from.description: The owner of the mailbox from which the message is sent. Must correspond to the actual mailbox used.

isRead.description: Whether the message must be marked as read

isReadReceiptRequested.description: Whether a read receipt is requested for the message

replyTo.description: Email address to use when replying

toRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of recipients

fields.description: The fields to add to the output

attachmentsPrefix.description: Prefix for name of the output fields to put the binary files data in. An index starting from 0 will be added. So if name is "attachment_" the first attachment is saved to "attachment_0".

downloadAttachments.description: Whether the message's attachments will be downloaded and included in the output

folderId.description: The folder you want to search in

fields.description: The fields to add to the output

includeChildFolders.description: Whether to include child folders in the response

outputFileName.description: Optional name of the output file, if not set message ID is used
Optional name of the output file, if not set message ID is used

saveAsDraft.description: Whether to save the message as a draft. If false, the message is sent immediately.

limitWaitTime.description: Whether to limit the time this node should wait for a user response before execution resumes

limitType.description: Sets the condition for the execution to resume. Can be a specified date or after some time.

afterTimeInterval.description: Waits for a certain amount of time

atSpecifiedTime.description: Waits until the set date and time to continue

maxDateAndTime.description: Continue execution after the specified date and time

limitType.description: Sets the condition for the execution to resume. Can be a specified date or after some time.

afterTimeInterval.description: Waits for a certain amount of time

atSpecifiedTime.description: Waits until the set date and time to continue

maxDateAndTime.description: Continue execution after the specified date and time

appendAttribution.description: Whether to include the phrase "This message was sent automatically with n8n" to the end of the message

responseFormTitle.description: Title of the form that the user can access to provide their response

responseFormDescription.description: Description of the form that the user can access to provide their response

responseFormCustomCss.description: Override default styling of the response form with CSS

fileName.description: Filename of the attachment. If not set will the file-name of the binary property be used, if it exists.

to.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of recipients

filtersNotice.displayName: Fetching a lot of messages may take a long time. Consider using filters to speed things up

search.description: Only return messages that contains search term. Without specific message properties, the search is carried out on the default search properties of from, subject, and body. More info.

receivedAfter.description: Get all messages received after the specified date. In an expression you can set date using string in ISO format or a timestamp in miliseconds.

receivedBefore.description: Get all messages received before the specified date. In an expression you can set date using string in ISO format or a timestamp in miliseconds.

sender.description: Sender name or email to filter by

foldersToExclude.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

foldersToInclude.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

receivedAfter.description: Get all messages received after the specified date. In an expression you can set date using string in ISO format or a timestamp in miliseconds.

receivedBefore.description: Get all messages received before the specified date. In an expression you can set date using string in ISO format or a timestamp in miliseconds.

sender.description: Sender name or email to filter by

foldersToExclude.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

foldersToInclude.description: Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression

replyToSenderOnly.description: Whether to reply to the sender only or to the entire list of recipients

toRecipients.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses of recipients

approval.description: User can approve/disapprove from within the message

freeText.description: User can submit a response via a form

customForm.description: User can submit a response via a custom form

fieldName.description: The name of the field, used in input attributes and referenced by the workflow

fieldLabel.description: Label that appears above the input field

fieldType.description: The type of field to add to the form

elementName.description: Optional field. It can be used to include the html in the output.

placeholder.description: Sample text to display inside the field

defaultValue.description: Default value(s) that will be pre-selected. Must match one or multiple of the option labels. Separate multiple pre-selected options with a comma.

fieldValue.description: Input value can be set here or will be passed as a query parameter via Field Name if no value is set

multiselectLegacyNotice.displayName: Multiple Choice is a legacy option, please use Checkboxes or Radio Buttons field type instead

multiselect.description: Whether to allow the user to select multiple options from the dropdown list

html.description: HTML elements to display on the form page

multipleFiles.description: Whether to allow the user to select multiple files from the file input or just one

acceptFileTypes.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions

formatDate.displayName: The displayed date is formatted based on the locale of the user's browser

requiredField.description: Whether to require the user to enter a value for this field before submitting the form
